name: Trend Comparison
description: Compares two or more prior run outputs and produces a report on trends and changes. Use from Run History: select 2+ completed runs, click Create report, choose this chain.
usage: Replace agent_id with the ID of an agent that can process multiple text inputs (e.g. Report Writer or any agent that accepts text). When run via Create report with input_run_refs, the worker injects each prior run's content as input parts labeled 'Run #N (chain/agent, date)'. The agent receives these and should compare them per the user's instructions.
